shieldGuardBaseDmyId.Wiki: Dummy Poly ID used as the direction reference (-1 is Master)

shieldGuardIsPosMaster.Wiki: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

pa1GuardBaseDmyId.AltName: Pulse Armor Guard Base Dummy Poly ID
pa1GuardBaseDmyId.Wiki: Dummy poly ID used for Pulse Armor.

pa1GuardIsPosMaster.AltName: Pulse Armor Detect Position Master Override
pa1GuardIsPosMaster.Wiki: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

pa2GuardBaseDmyId.AltName: Pulse Armor Guard Base Dummy Poly ID
pa2GuardBaseDmyId.Wiki: Dummy poly ID used for Pulse Armor.

pa2GuardIsPosMaster.AltName: Pulse Armor Detect Position Master Override
pa2GuardIsPosMaster.Wiki: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

paReuseEnableThreshold.Wiki: Specifies when PA can be used again after a guard break.

Self.Wiki: Defines certain shield or PA-related values for players and NPCs.
